nasb.text: How will they preach unless they are sent? Just as it is written, “How beautiful are the feet of those who bring good news of good things!”

esv.text: And how are they to preach unless they are sent? As it is written, “How beautiful are the feet of those who preach the good news!”

cnv.text: 如果沒有蒙差遣，怎能傳揚呢？如經上所記：“那些傳美事報喜訊的人，他們的腳蹤多麼美！”

ccb.text: 人没有受差遣，怎能传道呢？正如圣经上说：“那传福音之人的脚踪是何等佳美！”

csbs.text: 如果没有奉差派，又怎么能去传讲呢？正如经上所记：“传讲美好福音的人，他们的脚踪多么美丽！”
